info.title: GraphQL C# Client Generator Console App
info.description: A simple strongly typed C# GraphQL client generator console app

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A tool for generating C# GraphQL query builders and data classes

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --outputPath
options.description: Output path; include file name for single file output type; folder name for one class per file output type

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Root namespace all classes and other members are generated into

options.name: --serviceUrl
options.description: GraphQL service URL used for retrieving schema metadata

options.name: --schemaFileName
options.description: Path to schema metadata file in JSON format

options.name: --httpMethod
options.description: GraphQL schema metadata retrieval HTTP method [default: POST]

options.name: --header
options.description: Format: {Header}:{Value}; allows to enter custom headers required to fetch GraphQL metadata

options.name: --classPrefix
options.description: Class prefix; value "Test" extends class name to "TestTypeName"

options.name: --classSuffix
options.description: Class suffix, for instance for version control; value "V2" extends class name to "TypeNameV2"

options.name: --classMapping
options.description: Format: {GraphQlTypeName}:{C#ClassName}; allows to define custom class names for specific GraphQL types

options.name: --csharpVersion
options.description: C# version compatibility [default: Compatible]

options.name: --codeDocumentationType
options.description: Specifies code documentation generation option [default: Disabled]

options.name: --memberAccessibility
options.description: Class and interface access level [default: Public]

options.name: --outputType
options.description: Specifies generated classes organization [default: SingleFile]

options.name: --partialClasses
options.description: Mark classes as "partial" [default: False]

options.name: --booleanTypeMapping
options.description: Specifies the .NET type generated for GraphQL built-in Boolean data type [default: Boolean]

options.name: --floatTypeMapping
options.description: Specifies the .NET type generated for GraphQL built-in Float data type [default: Decimal]

options.name: --idTypeMapping
options.description: Specifies the .NET type generated for GraphQL built-in ID data type [default: Guid]

options.name: --integerTypeMapping
options.description: Specifies the .NET type generated for GraphQL built-in Integer data type [default: Int32]

options.name: --jsonPropertyAttribute
options.description: Specifies the condition for using "JsonPropertyAttribute" [default: CaseInsensitive]

options.name: --enumValueNaming
options.description: Use "Original" to avoid pretty C# name conversion for maximum deserialization compatibility [default: CSharp]

options.name: --dataClassMemberNullability
options.description: Specifies whether data class scalar properties generated always nullable (for better type reuse) or respect the GraphQL schema [default: AlwaysNullable]

options.name: --generationOrder
options.description: Specifies whether order of generated C# classes/enums respect the GraphQL schema or is enforced to alphabetical for easier change tracking [default: DefinedBySchema]

options.name: --inputObjectMode
options.description: Specifies whether input objects are generated as POCOs or they have support of GraphQL parameter references and explicit null values [default: Rich]

options.name: --includeDeprecatedFields
options.description: Includes deprecated fields in generated query builders and data classes [default: False]

options.name: --nullableReferences
options.description: Enables nullable references [default: False]

options.name: --fileScopedNamespaces
options.description: Specifies whether file-scoped namespaces should be used in generated files (C# 10 or later) [default: False]

options.name: --ignoreServiceUrlCertificateErrors
options.description: Ignores HTTPS errors when retrieving GraphQL metadata from an URL; typically when using self signed certificates [default: False]

options.name: --regexScalarFieldTypeMappingConfigurationFile
options.description: File name specifying rules for "RegexScalarFieldTypeMappingProvider"
